x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A set amount per reward provided or redeemed.

Comment:
$10 per gift card redeemed

x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A percentage of the reward value or transaction facilitated.

Comment:
5% of purchase value for cashback programs

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Compensation varies based on performance, volume, or redemption thresholds.

Comment:
3% commission for first 100 redemptions, 5% above 100

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cost Coverage
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Covers the cost incurred by the partner to provide the reward or service.

Comment:
Hotel reimbursed $200 per booked night
